title: Support & Help
description: Get help with your account, games, or subscription

email.title: Email Support
email.description: Send us an email and we'll get back to you

q1.question: How do I reset my password?
q1.answer: Click 'Forgot password?' on the login page and enter your email. You'll receive a link to reset your password.

q2.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
q2.answer: Go to Settings > Subscription and click 'Manage Subscription'. You can cancel anytime and keep access until your billing period ends.

q3.question: Why did my streak reset?
q3.answer: Streaks reset if you miss a day without using a streak freeze. Premium members get streak freezes each month to protect their progress.

resources.title: Helpful Resources
resources.description: Find more information about our service

contact.title: Need More Help?
contact.description: Can't find what you're looking for? Our support team is here to help.
